plugins.name: handy-commands
plugins.description: Helpful slash commands for common development workflows.

plugins.name: ban-ast
plugins.description: Ban code patterns using Tree Sitter AST queries with justification overrides.

plugins.name: component-explorer
plugins.description: Skills for setting up and using the VS Code Component Explorer — fixture-based visual testing with MCP-powered screenshot comparison.

plugins.name: model-council
plugins.description: Multi-model council for code review and planning — model-pinned agents independently review or plan, then findings are synthesized by consensus.

plugins.name: review-areas
plugins.description: Area-focused code review that fans out parallel subagents across different review perspectives.

plugins.name: review-plan
plugins.description: Review implementation plans before coding — fans out subagents across completeness, feasibility, sequencing, scope, and risk.

plugins.name: monitor-pr
plugins.description: Monitor a pull request until CI status and Copilot review are available via non-polling async terminal scripts.

plugins.name: github-inbox
plugins.description: Triage and act on your GitHub notifications — smart grouping, rules, memory, and sub-agents for review, triage, and investigation.
